tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall address
    delete DNS-Exfil-Server
    edit "DNS-Exfil-Server"
        set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
    next
end
config firewall policy
    delete 2
    delete 3
    edit 0
        set name "DENY-DNS-EXFIL-8853"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "DNS-Exfil-Server"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
    next
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall address

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) #     delete DNS-Exfil-Server
The entry is used by other 2 entries
Command fail. Return code -23

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) #     edit "DNS-Exfil-Server"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-Exfil-Server) #         set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.2 55.255

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-Exfil-Server) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     delete 2

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     delete 3

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 0
new entry '0' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set name "DENY-DNS-EXFIL-8853"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set action deny

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set srcaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set dstaddr "DNS-Exfil-Server"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set service "ALL"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "DENY-DNS-EXFIL-8853"
        set uuid 65161032-32a9-51f1-827e-b85ae7bbc324
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "DNS-Exfil-Server"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    move 2 before 100
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 2 before 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "DENY-DNS-EXFIL-8853"
        set uuid 65161032-32a9-51f1-827e-b85ae7bbc324
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "DNS-Exfil-Server"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable

end
